title: Mespilodaphne klepperae
taxonomy: Mespilodaphne klepperae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant belongs to the genus Mespilodaphne, which is a part of the broader Lauraceae family. The Lauraceae family includes a wide range of evergreen trees and shrubs. Mespilodaphne klepperae is a rare species that is known for its unique characteristics and limited distribution.
